what_we_did: Built an LLM-based extraction pipeline for a 320-employee bank. Reads PDF invoices, extracts line items, matches against open POs, and routes exceptions to human review. 82% straight-through processing rate.
problem_fit: Prospect has manual invoice processing across 12 departments, directly matching the pain point we solved for the original client.
confirmed: Financial services industry (same as original engagement)

calibration.confidence_note: Assumes similar invoice volume per employee. ERP confirmation would increase confidence.

key_question: What ERP system do they use? That determines if we can integrate directly or need a custom connector.
